markdownRemark.html:
Awesome low-code!

A collection of Awesome low-code development platform (LCDP). Everyone is welcome to submit their new Awesome low-code item.

License

Table of Contents

  • Automation
  • Educational
  • Flow-based programming
  • Online database creator apps
  • Visual programming
  • Misc

Automation

  • Appian - Discover the power of low-code automation.
  • Automate.io - Connect your cloud apps.
  • Axiom - Browser automation. Quickly, without code.
  • Blink - No-code automation for CloudOps.
  • Camunda - Automate Any Process, Anywhere.
  • Data Fetcher for Airtable - Connect Airtable to any API using the Data Fetcher app.
  • Make - Make lets you design, build, and automate anything from tasks and workflows to apps and systems.
  • Phantombuster - Code free automations and data extraction.
  • Reflect - Automated regression tests without a line of code.
  • Stackby - Automate workflows, build custom tools, collaborate with your team.
  • Uipath - We make robots so people don’t have to be robots.

Educational

  • Doc Willianms - No Code tutorials.
  • Markerpad - Join thousands learning to build software. No coding required.

Flow-based programming

  • AppFlow - Securely integrate apps and automate data flows at any scale, without code.
  • Bravo Studio - Bravo’s powerful no-code approach to mobile app development.
  • Funnel - All your marketing and advertising data where you want it.
  • Ifttt - Helps your apps and devices work together in new ways.
  • Impira - Grab data from any document in seconds with Impira’s no-code platform powered by machine learning.
  • joonbot - Make a chatbot in minutes with our intuitive no-code chatbot builder.
  • Kissflow - The full spectrum of work on one platform.
  • n8n.io - Extendable workflow automation.
  • Node-RED - A programming tool for wiring together hardware devices, APIs and online services in new and interesting ways.
  • Parabola - Hand off your routine data tasks by describing them in Parabola. Build once, reuse infinitely.
  • Stately - The ideal state of visual application logic.
  • Structr - The visualization of the data and program structures as a graph accelerates the development and makes the results easily comprehensible for everyone at any time.
  • Wayscript - A rapid scripting platform for developers.
  • Zapier - Connect your apps and automate workflows.

Machine Learning

  • Accern - Accelerate AI Workflows for Financial Services.
  • AI Builder - Bring intelligent automation to your business processes with AI that’s easy to train and configure in Power Automate.
  • Alteryx - Scale data science across your business with automated machine learning (AutoML).
  • Dataiku - Build advanced machine learning models using the latest techniques.
  • DataRobot - DataRobot Automated Machine Learning with Visual AI.
  • h2o - Get free, hands-on experience with the H2O AI Hybrid Cloud.
  • Jasper - Artificial intelligence makes it fast & easy to create content for your blog, social media, website, and more!
  • Knime - Creating Data Science.
  • RapidMiner - Comprehensive data science platform with visual workflow design and full automation.
  • Noogata - AI platform gives companies the impact of data science without the burden of development or the limitations of out-of-the-box solutions.
  • SaegMaker - Machine learning for every data scientist and developer.
  • Sas - On-demand programming access to machine learning algorithms in the cloud.

Online database creator apps

  • Airtable - Part spreadsheet, part database, and entirely flexible, teams use Airtable to organize their work, their way.
  • Amplication - Build production-ready Node.js applications without wasting time on repetitive coding.
  • Baserow - Open source no-code database and Airtable alternative.
  • Caspio - Building online database applications without coding.
  • Coda - All-in-one doc.
  • Hasura - From your databases to a unified GraphQL API in just one minute.
  • NocoDB - NocoDB is an open source #NoCode platform that turns any database into a smart spreadsheet.
  • Retool - Retool cuts the time it takes to build internal tools in half so you can focus on your customers.
  • Rows - The spreadsheet with superpowers.
  • Supabase - The Open SourceFirebase Alternative.

Visual programming

  • Adalo - Turn Your Amazing App Concept Into Reality Without Coding!
  • Appbase.io - Elasticsearch supercharged.
  • AppSheet - The fastest way to build apps and automate work.
  • Appsmith - A powerful open source framework to build internal tools.
  • Appwrite - Secure Open-Source Backend Server for Web, Mobile & Flutter Developers.
  • Bildr - Open-ended, extensible, collaboration-focused website and web app builder.
  • Boundlesslabs - Boundless lets you build the web site of your dreams. No code required.
  • bubble - A code-free programming language that lets you build and host web applications without engineers.
  • Carrd - Simple, free, fully responsive one-page sites for pretty much anything.
  • Cloudscape - An open source design system for the cloud.
  • Dronahq - Build business apps without coding.
  • Heyflow - Build interactive flows.
  • Glide - Create an app from a Google Sheet in five minutes, for free.
  • Growform - The Multi Step Form Builder that Gets You More Leads.
  • Honeycode - Build a better way to work.
  • Insomnia - Build APIs that work.
  • Jotform App - Create apps for your business.
  • Outsystems - Build Applications Fast, Right, and for the Future.
  • Plasmic - The visual builder for your tech stack.
  • Potion - Create custom websitesin minutes. All on Notion.
  • Power Apps - Create the high productivity apps you need for your business with an advanced set of tools.
  • Quarkly - Design tool for creating websites and web apps.
  • Quickbase - Application development platform that unites business and IT teams.
  • Sanity - The unified content platform.
  • Softr - From zero to a website in 5 minutes, using building blocks.
  • Stacker - Turn your spreadsheets into applications.
  • Storybook - Build component driven UIs faster.
  • Super - Build websites with the simplicity of Notion.
  • Typedream - The new way to make a website.
  • Webflow - Build better business websites, faster. Without coding.

Marketing

  • AppSumo - Discover, buy, & sell the products you need to grow your business.
  • Bannerbear - Auto-generate social media visuals, ecommerce banners, dynamic email images and more with our API and integrations.

Misc

  • Algolia - Flexible Search & Discovery Hosted APIs.
  • Autocode - New user notifications. Purchase alerts. Scheduled jobs. SQL queries.
  • Craftar - Build APIs with NoCode at Lightning Speed.
  • Doppler - Sync environment variables at scale.
  • Fibery - Build your own workspace.
  • Getstream - Stream powers Chat Messaging and Activity Feeds for billions of global end-users across thousands of different apps.
  • Makerpad - Build tools & automate at work without code.
  • NoCodeAPI - The easiest way to connect with APIs.
  • placeid - Generate your social share images automatically.
  • SaaS Blocks - Ready-to-use building blocks and APIs to take your SaaS application to the next level
  • Screenshot - Programmatic Screenshots of Any Website in Seconds.
  • Shopify - Build your business.
  • Simplescraper - Extract data from any website in seconds.
  • Stripe - The new standard in online payments.
  • ToolJetstars14k - Low-code framework for building internal tools.
  • Vantiq - The Only Low Code Platform for Real Time Systems.
  • Voiceflow - Design, prototype and build voice apps.
  • Zendesk - Build the best customer experiences.
